C1AHS_CSCM_DDT_3_0_0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DAD7F2
Recv ID: 18DAF2D7
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: D7
Func Name: CHADeMo

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "1",
    "supplier": "CK",
    "soft": "0003",
    "version": "0001"
  }
]
